summary: In the case of burst-fire weapons that use

mechanics.name_guess: In the case of burst-fire weapons that use
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 119 > items > In the case of burst-fire weapons that use
mechanics.excerpt: In the case of burst-fire weapons that use power packs, such as pulse lasers each shot fired in the burst consumes the standard amount of power points_ The additional recoil generated by firing weapon burst mode adds TN modifier depending on the number of shots fired ad the recoil rating of the weapon: If the recoil rating apply +1 TN Modifier for every shot fired burst mode: recoil rating of means there is +1 Modifier for every shots fired (or fraction thereof)_ recoil rating of 3 adds +1 Modifier for every shots fired (or fraction thereof)_ and SO on.
